name: Macaroni Medley Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Fresh dill, chopped, or 1 tablespoon Dill
15 ounces Canned kidney beans, drained and rinsed
10 ounces Frozen green beans, cooked, drained and cooled
8 ounces Fat-free cheddar cheese, Healthy Choice, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the buttermilk, mayonnaise, and chopped dill until well combined.
2. Add the cooled rotini pasta, drained kidney beans, and cooled green beans to the bowl with the dressing.
3. Fold in the cubed cheddar cheese.
4. Stir gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
16 Servings
